cards.prompt: DynamicMethod AddOne из IL ldarg.0/ldc.i4.1/add/ret, CreateDelegate, f(41)?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection.Emit; var dm = new DynamicMethod("AddOne", typeof(int), new[]{typeof(int)}); var il = dm.GetILGenerator(); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ldarg_0); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ldc_I4_1); il.Emit(OpCodes.Add); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ret); var f = (Func<int,int>)dm.CreateDelegate(typeof(Func<int,int>)); Console.WriteLine(f(41));

using System; using System.Reflection.Emit; var dm = new DynamicMethod("Mul", typeof(int), new[]{typeof(int),typeof(int)}); var il = dm.GetILGenerator(); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ldarg_0); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ldarg_1); il.Emit(OpCodes.Mul); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ret); var f = (Func<int,int,int>)dm.CreateDelegate(typeof(Func<int,int,int>)); Console.WriteLine(f(6,7));

cards.prompt: DynamicMethod Square из ldarg.0/dup/mul/ret, f(9) и dm.Name?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection.Emit; var dm = new DynamicMethod("Square", typeof(int), new[]{typeof(int)}); var il = dm.GetILGenerator(); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ldarg_0); il.Emit(OpCodes.Dup); il.Emit(OpCodes.Mul); il.Emit(OpCodes.Ret); var f = (Func<int,int>)dm.CreateDelegate(typeof(Func<int,int>)); Console.WriteLine(f(9)); Console.WriteLine(dm.Name);
